Seed._comment: true for the 48h reseed: seeds the fresh/empty DB from the embedded workbook on boot; SAFE to leave on (a populated DB is skipped, only an empty one seeds).

_bots_comment: PROD-ONLY experimental config for the 48h test (docs/PROD_48H_TEST_PLAN.md). Deep-merges over appsettings.json so only these leaf keys override; the whole realism config stays. TradeIntervalMs 250 + Staggering Slots 4 = smoother tape (fills per 250ms render frame). Rotator+BankEstimate ON = live-test the estimate-driven cohort. Scaler corrections are STAGED OFF here on purpose (enable DutyCycleDenominator/ActionableSpanSizing/SelfCorrectingDelay/MaxTickMultiple only AFTER CK=0 confirms, per plan 1c). All reversible: flip a key + restart. PhaseTimingSeconds 20 emits the BotPhase profiling line.

Bots._dipbuy_tune: MARKET TUNE (2026-07-09): prod showed a slow persistent down-drift (-3.3%@01:21 -> -4.27%@02:19, ~-1%/h) under the full realism-v2 config. Raise DipBuyStrength 2.0 -> 3.0 = stronger idle-cash dip demand (dip-gated, no up-pressure, self-limiting) to floor the drift toward neutral. Reversible: remove this key + restart.
